title: Require Oclif Command Plugin Topology
forbids: a missing command-plugin package anchor, a second command root, an open source root, or a plugin-owned executable binary
why: Every first-party Oclif command capability has the same package shell and one source command root. Generated dependency and build directories remain admitted outputs, while the host application alone owns the executable.
remediate: Keep package, test, and TypeScript anchors at each plugins/cli package root. Put commands under src/commands, shared private helpers under src/lib, and expose no package-local bin directory.
message: Every Oclif command plugin must retain one closed package and command-source topology.
